title: Depth-resolved imaging of photosensitizer in the rodent brain using fluorescence laminar optical tomography.
author: Gaitan B Inglut CT Liu Y Chen Y Huang HC
content: S-EPMC7519352 PMC7519352 Depth-resolved imaging of photosensitizer in the rodent brain using fluorescence laminar optical tomography. Previous studies have been performed to image photosensitizers in certain organs and tumors using fluorescence laminar optical tomography. Currently, no work has yet
